behavior_in_task_description.reason: All test-asserted paths (SetupSccache.cmake, SetupCcache.cmake, scripts/build-cache, CONTRIBUTING.md, docs/project/contributing.mdx, docs/project/building-windows.mdx) and behaviors (no REQUIRED, brew/apt install ccache, --show-stats, no AWS/S3, scoop nodejs ccache) are mentioned in instruction.md.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what should happen (remove sccache, make ccache optional) without giving exact code replacements.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests use regex/substring checks allowing flexible implementations; e.g., find_command OR find_program both acceptable.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests use subprocess (ls, find, which, ccache --version) alongside file inspection; verifies actual filesystem state and binary availability.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests check specific file removals and content additions that a stub cannot satisfy.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover sccache removal, ccache optional, doc updates for all three files, and AWS/S3 removal as described.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests have descriptive names and docstrings grouped by concern (build system, docs).

structured_data_schema.reason: Task does not produce structured data output.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names files that are the subject of the task, which is appropriate for a refactor task.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Gold patch changes are localized to the specified files.
